section.heading: Program report
section.chapeau: Not later than two years after August 14, 2008, and every two years thereafter, the Secretary shall prepare and submit to the authorizing committees a report on TEACH grants with respect to the schools and students served by recipients of such grants. Such report shall take into consideration information related to—

paragraph.content: the number of TEACH grant recipients;
the degrees obtained by such recipients;
the location, including the school, local educational agency, and State, where the recipients completed the service agreed to under section 1070g–2(b) of this title and the subject taught;
the duration of such service; and
any other data necessary to conduct such evaluation.

section.sourceCredit: (Pub. L. 89–329, title IV, § 420P, as added Pub. L. 110–315, title IV, § 412(a)(2), Aug. 14, 2008, 122 Stat. 3227.)
